author: FF-GardenFn
name: SSDGolf — Mamba-3 SSD + Depth Recurrence + 4-bit QAT
blurb: First SSM-based submission. Mamba-3 enhanced SSD (BCNorm, RoPE on B/C, trapezoidal discretization, log-uniform timescale init) with depth recurrence (N=4 shared block iterations), x0 gradient highway, untied embeddings, 4-bit QAT. d=1536, 31.8M params, 14.0MB artifact.
